Text.Page:
Now the need for the fruit is clear? Ready for another visit to Pora Elinu and Lenka?

The bandages are necessary and thus the fruit is necessary.

Oh! Fruit juice in bandages. That smells better.

Why didn't Tidak just say so?
These bandages will save many lives. A good alcemist is a treasure. Know that your services are treasured.
The fruit has been retrieved—that's a relief. Good to know someone is handling it.
